task_completion.description: Verify that the agent logged into OpenProject as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile/avatar indicates 'admin' is logged in, or the Administration panel (which requires admin rights) is visible in the OpenProject web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Critical - Safety' work package priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Enumerations -> Work package priorities list, 'Critical - Safety' is present. It should be marked as active (usually a checkmark) and NOT marked as default.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Regulatory Deadline' work package priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Enumerations -> Work package priorities list, 'Regulatory Deadline' is present. It should be marked as active and NOT marked as default.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Security Audit' time tracking activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Enumerations -> Activities (time tracking) list, 'Security Audit' is present and marked as active.

task_completion.description: Verify the priority update for the target work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package titled 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' is visible, and its Priority field is clearly set to 'Critical - Safety'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with OpenProject.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenProject web interface in a browser, with evidence of form inputs and UI navigation, rather than terminal windows executing API requests or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenProject UI is visible with its standard layout, menus, and styling, not a text editor or static HTML mock.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing Ruby, Python, or bash scripts being executed to modify the OpenProject database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target work package: 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. Expected priorities to create: 'Critical - Safety' and 'Regulatory Deadline' (both Active: Yes, Default: No). Expected time tracking activity to create: 'Security Audit' (Active: Yes). Expected priority for the target work package: 'Critical - Safety'.
